zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas De Poyntz II於1220年出生在英國薩默塞特加里 馬利特時，他的父親Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet22歲，母親Hawise Malet18歲。他於大約1251年與Elizabeth Isabel Dyall在英國薩默塞特加里 馬利特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1273年10月7日在英國薩默塞特文卡頓享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Poyntz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Points
meanings: from the Old French personal name Ponz, Ponce, from Latin Pontius (see Ponce ).

habitational name from any of several places called Ponts (such as those in Manche and in Seine-Maritime, Normandy), from Latin pontes ‘bridges’. This name has been established since the 13th century in Ireland, where it appears as Pounce and Pounche, and is Gaelicized as Púinse.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas De Poyntz II was born in 1220, in Curry Mallet, Somerset, England, his father, Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet, was 22 and his mother, Hawise Malet, was 18. He married Elizabeth Isabel Dyall about 1251, in Curry Mallet, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 7 October 1273, in Wincanton, Somerset, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas De Poyntz II est né en 1220, à Curry Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Hawise Malet, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Isabel Dyall environ 1251, à Curry Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 7 octobre 1273, à Wincanton, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas De Poyntz II 1220 in Curry Mallet, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet 22 und seine Mutter Hawise Malet 18. Er hat um 1251 in Curry Mallet, Somerset, England Elizabeth Isabel Dyall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 7. Oktober 1273 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Wincanton, Somerset, England und wurde in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas De Poyntz II è nato il nel 1220 nel Curry Mallet, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Hawise Malet, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Isabel Dyall circa 1251, nel Curry Mallet, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas De Poyntz IIが1220年にイギリスソメルセトクウリー マレットで生まれた時，父Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Malletは22歳，母Hawise Maletは18歳であった。約1251年にイギリスソメルセトクウリー マレットでElizabeth Isabel Dyallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1273年10月7日にイギリスソメルセトウィンカントンで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアイロン アクトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas De Poyntz II(이)가 1220년 영국 서머세트 커리 맬렛에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise Malet(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1251년 영국 서머세트 커리 맬렛에서 Elizabeth Isabel Dyall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1273년 10월 7일 영국 서머세트 윈캔턴에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 이런 악턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas De Poyntz II nasceu em 1220, em Curry Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Malet, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Isabel Dyall aproximadamente 1251, em Curry Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 7 de outubro de 1273, em Wincanton, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas De Poyntz II родился в 1220 г. в местности курри маллет, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Hawise Malet, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Isabel Dyall около 1251 г. в местности курри маллет, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 7 октября 1273 г. в местности винкантон, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности ирон актон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas De Poyntz II nació en 1220, en Curry Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Baron Hugh Poyntz, Baron of Curry Mallet, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Hawise Malet, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Isabel Dyall aproximadamente 1251, en Curry Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de octubre de 1273, en Wincanton, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
